metadata.title: About Velomac Flow Meter | Manufacturer-Direct Industrial Instrumentation
metadata.description: Velomac Flow Meter is a manufacturer-direct industrial instrumentation brand focused on flow measurement for process industries.

hero.label: About Velomac
hero.headline: Flow Measurement Support, Close to the Factory Floor
hero.description: Velomac Flow Meter is a manufacturer-direct industrial instrumentation brand supporting steam, gas, liquid and chemical flow measurement for process industries.
hero.timelineLine: Founded in 2006, with decades of flow measurement manufacturing experience.

image.alt: Velomac production floor with flowmeter product support

companyProfile.label: Company Profile
companyProfile.headline: Industrial Flow Measurement with Factory-Close Support
companyProfile.description: Velomac supports product manufacturing, in-house calibration and application-based model selection for steam, gas, liquid and chemical applications.

processContext.label: Process Context
processContext.headline: Factory Support Connected to Real Working Lines
processContext.description: Product selection is tied to the actual process condition: media, pipe size, flow range, pressure, temperature, installation space and site vibration.

image.alt: Velomac factory floor with flowmeter production context

capabilities.label: Capabilities
capabilities.headline: Manufacturer-Direct, Calibration-Aware, Application-Based
capabilities.intro: For overseas buyers, the important question is not only which model exists, but whether the configuration fits the real site condition.

points.title: Manufacturer-Direct Production
points.text: Product manufacturing and application communication stay close to the factory.

points.title: In-House Calibration
points.text: Gas and liquid calibration support meter checking before shipment.

points.title: R&D and Technical Support
points.text: The team helps connect product configuration with media, flow range, installation and signal needs.

points.title: Application-Based Model Selection
points.text: Selection starts with process conditions, not only product family names.

image.alt: Velomac flowmeter test system and product setup

calibration.label: Calibration
calibration.headline: Calibration Capabilities
calibration.description: Gas and liquid calibration capabilities support flowmeter checking before shipment and help align the meter with intended process conditions.

image.alt: Velomac flowmeter wiring and final checking before shipment

standards.title: Gas Flow Standards
standards.text: Pipeline range DN15-DN300, sonic nozzle vacuum system, pulse capacity up to 10 kHz, uncertainty <= 0.3%.

standards.title: Liquid Flow Standards
standards.text: Pipeline range DN15-DN600, with reference electromagnetic meters and static mass method details available for calibration review.

finalCta.label: Company Timeline
finalCta.headline: Founded in 2006
finalCta.text: Founded in 2006, with decades of flow measurement manufacturing experience.
